prompt: Show a paginated table of all deliveries in the Control Tower with sortable columns and a status filter chip row
expected_avoid: assuming flat array — envelope is { status: 'Success', data, pagination }
expected_use: @dash/data-table primitive (TanStack v8 internally is OK — encapsulated)
@dash/tag for removable filter chips, @dash/filter (Popover+Command+Tag) for chip row
axios + manual setLoading for the fetch
MUI / antd table swap is tolerated if page already uses them — do not force-replace
expected_pattern_ref: Decision tree — Tables (rules L31-35); Tag vs Badge naming (rules L144); Refuse anti-pattern #8 'force MUI/antd' (rules L584); next-backoffice-web envelope (rules L394)
context_notes: Control Tower is THE flagship surface in backoffice. There may already be a MUI/antd table on adjacent pages — do not force-swap on existing code. New table = @dash/data-table. Filter chips use @dash/tag (removable) + @dash/filter pattern, not antd Tag.
